summary: W857 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while routing W519 closedness-derived forgetful homology preservation through the W668 kernel/cokernel-conditioned endpoint topology surface used by W831. It introduces endpoint ExactAt kernel/cokernel facts, constructs MetrizableExactAtKernelCokernelConditionedTopologyInputs from the W519 closedness branch, and reuses W831 for direct bounded left calculus and the stable package. Product success remains false because the route still needs concrete exact-closedness, closedness, endpoint kernel/cokernel, localized-right-adjoint, stable-category, final witness, and review-packet evidence.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W857 reduces one endpoint topology route to two ExactAt kernel/cokernel universal-property facts, but still requires exact-closedness, a matched W519 closedness branch, endpoint kernel/cokernel facts, localized-right-adjoint data, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated data.

The W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider is still not concretely instantiated; its boundary, relation, target-surjective/compact, closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint facts, and localized-right-adjoint fields remain open.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or prove one concrete W857 input next, preferably the endpoint ExactAt kernel/cokernel facts or a reusable exact-closedness/localized-right-adjoint provider.
Connect the W857 or W856 route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
